name: Bath Savings Institution
description_short: Bath Savings Institution is a community bank serving coastal Maine with checking, savings, credit cards, auto loans, and investment services.
description_long:
Bath Savings Institution is a regional bank operating in coastal Maine with a physical presence in the Bath area and online banking capabilities. The institution positions itself as a community-focused "neighbor" bank rather than a national chain, emphasizing personal service and local relationships. Their routing number (211274447) and branch infrastructure suggest an established regional financial institution.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking products including personal and business checking accounts, savings accounts, auto financing (car loans), credit cards for personal spending management, and investment/retirement planning services. They provide online and mobile banking access, debit cards, check ordering, and account management tools. Bath Savings also partners with third-party services like Greenlight (a family savings app) to expand their digital offerings to customers.

Bath Savings distinguishes itself through regional presence and personalized customer service, with dedicated branch management, multiple customer service channels (phone, email, in-person), and flexible account options. The bank emphasizes security features and provides after-hours support through a dedicated line (1-844-665-5229). Their promotional partnership with Greenlight's SELECT plan at no cost to qualifying customers demonstrates efforts to modernize their offering.

As a traditional regional bank, Bath Savings serves customers seeking FDIC-insured deposit accounts and conventional banking services. However, the website provides limited detail on competitive rates, fee structures, minimum balance requirements, loan terms, or credit card APRs. Investment products carry standard disclaimers about FDIC coverage and principal risk. For customers prioritizing convenience over competitive pricing research, Bath Savings offers established local banking with personal service.
services: Savings accounts (including Packard and Senior account types)
Debit cards with activation and PIN management
Greenlight family savings app partnership (no-cost SELECT plan)
Lost/stolen card reporting and debit card services
pros: FDIC-insured deposit accounts provide federal protection up to $250,000
Multiple customer service channels: phone (1-800-447-4559), email, after-hours line (1-844-665-5229), and in-person branches
Online and mobile banking with separate business account access
Free Greenlight SELECT family savings app plan for qualifying customers through 5/26/2028
Comprehensive product suite including auto loans, credit cards, and investment services
Established regional institution with physical branch locations in coastal Maine
Automatic debit card activation and PIN management via phone (1-800-992-3808)
cons: Website lacks specific information on checking/savings account rates, APYs, or fee structures
Limited transparency on auto loan rates, terms, credit card APRs, or credit requirements
Regional footprint limited to coastal Maine; limited convenience for customers outside service area
Investment products are not FDIC-insured and carry principal loss risk with no performance guarantees
Promotion pricing (Greenlight plan) expires 5/26/2028 and customers will face monthly fees thereafter
best_for: Coastal Maine residents seeking local community banking with in-person branch access
Customers prioritizing established regional banks over national chains or neobanks
Families interested in free financial education through the Greenlight partnership
Business owners seeking personal and business accounts from the same institution
diagnosis: Bath Savings Institution is best for coastal Maine residents and regional customers seeking traditional community banking with established branch locations, FDIC-insured deposits, and multi-service product offerings. The main caveat is limited online pricing transparency—prospective customers must contact the bank directly to compare rates, fees, and loan terms before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
